steps: Go to https://dash.bunny.net and log in (or create a free account)
Click your profile picture or account name in the top-right corner
Select 'Account' or navigate directly to https://dash.bunny.net/account/api-keys
Your primary account API key is displayed in the 'API Key' section
Click the eye icon or 'Show' to reveal the key, then copy it

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key (AccessKey)
credential_fields.description: Your Bunny.net account API key, sent in the 'AccessKey' request header

notes: Bunny.net uses different keys for different services: the account API key (for pull zones, DNS, storage zone management), storage zone passwords (for file uploads/downloads via Edge Storage), and video library API keys (for stream management)
The account-level API key at dash.bunny.net/account/api-keys covers the main management API
Free trial with $10 credit available; pay-as-you-go pricing after that
API key is a UUID format
Rate limits apply; check documentation for specifics

test_endpoint.description: Lists all CDN pull zones in your account — confirms the API key is valid
